title: EsamSignalProcessingNotification
description: ESAM SignalProcessingNotification data defined by OC-SP-ESAM-API-I03-131025.

allOf.description: Provide your ESAM SignalProcessingNotification XML document inside your JSON job settings. Form the XML document as per OC-SP-ESAM-API-I03-131025. The transcoder will use the signal processing instructions in the message that you supply. Provide your ESAM SignalProcessingNotification XML document inside your JSON job settings. For your MPEG2-TS file outputs, if you want the service to place SCTE-35 markers at the insertion points you specify in the XML document, you must also enable SCTE-35 ESAM (scte35Esam). Note that you can either specify an ESAM XML document or enable SCTE-35 passthrough. You can't do both.
